memoryArtifacts.headline: Carol's Experience Learning About Thomas Dudley
memoryArtifacts.description: On Nov 27, 2016 after speaking in the Burlington 2nd Ward, Burlington, Wyoming, Carol Partridge McIntosh approached me, Rena Croft, & wanted to share a Family History story. I asked if she would mind if I recorded it so that it could be  added to Family Search.  She agreed & this is the story she shared that day. She testified that she knows that her ancestors want us to know their stories.

popularStory.headline: Gov. Thomas Dudley (1576 - 1653)
popularStory.description: Thomas Dudley, the only son of Capt. Roger Dudley and Susanna Thorne, was born in 1576 at Northampton, England. On March 14, 1590, when he was fourteen years old, his father was killed at the Battle o …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Governor Thomas Dudley於1576年10月12日出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾亞德利 海斯廷斯時，他的父親Roger Dudley41歲，母親Susannah Thorne16歲。他於1603年4月25日與Dorothy Yorke在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈丁斯同結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1630年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼薩萊姆。他於1646年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼被列為deputy governor。他去世於1653年7月31日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年76歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛波利艾略特 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Governor Thomas Dudley于1576年10月12日出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾亞德利 海斯廷斯时，他的父亲Roger Dudley41岁，母亲Susannah Thorne16岁。他于1603年4月25日与Dorothy Yorke在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈丁斯同结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1630年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼薩萊姆。他于1646年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼被列为deputy governor。他去世于1653年7月31日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年76岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛波利艾略特 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Dudley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from Dudley in Worcestershire, recorded as Duddeleye, Doddeleye in the 13th and 14th centuries, named from the Old English personal name Dudda (see Dodd 1) + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

Irish (southern Ireland): in Ireland, when not the English name, it was adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Ó Dubhdáleithe ‘descendant of Dubhdáleithe’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + dá ‘two’ + léithe ‘sides’.

variants.name: Dowdall
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish John Patrick, Niall.
Irish (Dublin, Meath, and Louth): English surname adopted by bearers of Gaelic Ó Dubhdáleithe (see Dudley 2).

variants.name: Dagley
meanings: English: variant of Dadley, itself a variant of Dudley , with dissimilation of d-d to d-g.
Americanized form of German Dägele (see Dagle ) or Degele, from a short form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names formed with Old High German diot ‘people, nation’.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

variants.name: Diddle
meanings: English: possibly a variant of   Dudley  . Compare   Aduddell  .
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form of German   Dittel  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Oldest Grave seen in the Memorials Link.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Governor Thomas Dudley was born on 12 October 1576, in Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Roger Dudley, was 41 and his mother, Susannah Thorne, was 16. He married Dorothy Yorke on 25 April 1603, in Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He immigrated to Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1630. In 1646, his occupation is listed as deputy governor in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 31 July 1653, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 76, and was buried in Eliot Burying Ground, Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Governor Thomas Dudley est né le 12 octobre 1576, à Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Dudley, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Susannah Thorne, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Dorothy Yorke le 25 avril 1603, à Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il a immigré au Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1630. En 1646, sa profession de son indiquée est deputy governor à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 31 juillet 1653, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Eliot Burying Ground, Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Governor Thomas Dudley am 12. Oktober 1576 in Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Dudley 41 und seine Mutter Susannah Thorne 16. Er hat am 25. April 1603 in Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, England Dorothy Yorke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er ist 1630 nach Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America eingewandert. 1646 ist sein Beruf als deputy governor in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb am 31. Juli 1653 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Eliot Burying Ground, Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Governor Thomas Dudley è nato il il 12 ottobre 1576 nel Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Roger Dudley, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Susannah Thorne, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Dorothy Yorke il 25 aprile 1603, nel Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Immigrato nel Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1630. Nel 1646, la sua occupazione è indicata come deputy governor nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Morì il 31 luglio 1653, nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Eliot Burying Ground, Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Governor Thomas Dudleyが1576年10月12日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアヤードリー ハスティングズで生まれた時，父Roger Dudleyは41歳，母Susannah Thorneは16歳であった。1603年4月25日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーディングストーンでDorothy Yorkeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1630年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーサレムに移住した。1646年，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーでの職業はdeputy governorと記録されている。彼は1653年7月31日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーで76歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンロクスブリーエリオト ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Governor Thomas Dudley(이)가 1576년 10월 12일 영국 노르섬프토실르 야어들리 하스틴그스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Dudley(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Susannah Thorne(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1603년 4월 25일 영국 노르섬프토실르 하르딩스톤에서 Dorothy Yorke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1630년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 살렘로 이민을 떠났다. 1646년, 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 deputy governor이었다. 그는 1653년 7월 31일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이 엘리엇 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Governor Thomas Dudley nasceu em 12 de outubro de 1576, em Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Dudley, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Susannah Thorne, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Dorothy Yorke em 25 de abril de 1603, em Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1630. Em 1646, sua profissão aparece como deputy governor em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 31 de julho de 1653, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Eliot Burying Ground, Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Governor Thomas Dudley родился 12 октября 1576 г. в местности ярдли хастингс, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Dudley было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Susannah Thorne, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothy Yorke 25 апреля 1603 г. в местности хардингстоун, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он иммигрировал в сеилем, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1630 году. В 1646 году он работал по профессии deputy governor в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 31 июля 1653 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности элиот буринг гроунд, роксбури, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Governor Thomas Dudley nació el 12 de octubre de 1576, en Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Dudley, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Susannah Thorne, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Dorothy Yorke el 25 de abril de 1603, en Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Inmigró a Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1630. En 1646, su ocupación registrada era deputy governor en Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Murió el 31 de julio de 1653, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Eliot Burying Ground, Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
